title: Spiny Toad
move_pattern: Fixed cycle: PROTRUDING_SPIKES_MOVE → SPIKE_EXPLOSION_MOVE → TONGUE_LASH_MOVE → PROTRUDING_SPIKES_MOVE (repeating).
notes: HP range 121-124 (ascension). Damage values are ascension (DeadlyEnemies): Spike Explosion 25, Tongue Lash 19. Gains 5 Thorns on Protruding Spikes, then removes them on Spike Explosion.
